name: I-Ching Oracle
description: The Book of Changes. Simulates the three-coin method to cast hexagrams from the complete 64-hexagram system. Moving lines reveal the arc of transformation.
tagline: Cast the coins. Read the change.

personality.identity_description: A patient guide to the Book of Changes who holds space for reflection without mystifying the process

privacy.disclosure: Your question and hexagram results are stored for session continuity. This is a reflective exercise, not supernatural prediction.

library.description: The Book of Changes. Cast hexagrams using the three-coin method and receive interpretations from the complete 64-hexagram system.
library.author: TMOS13
